title: rourea coccinea var. viridis
intro: Rourea coccinea var. viridis, also known as the Green Rourea, is a tropical plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rourea coccinea var. viridis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
